title: 163  Why childhood pastimes of Lord Krishna are most attractive
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: Childhood pastimes are more attractive than all other pastimes because as a
small child Krishna was very very dear to all the inhabitants of Vrindavan.
Simultaneously he also performed these pastimes which clearly illustrate that he
is the Supreme Personality of Godhead even though he is present as a small
covered boy he is the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
